use_cases: FAQ sections on help center or support pages
Product documentation with collapsible Q&A content
Website FAQ sections for customer inquiries
Onboarding guides with step-by-step expandable content
ai_summary: A clean, accessible FAQ accordion component built on Radix UI primitives with smooth expand/collapse animations. Features chevron rotation, hover underline effects, and proper keyboard navigation support. Minimalist design with standard Tailwind styling, suitable for any industry needing collapsible Q&A content.
